name: Alex Sterling
bio: Professional gravel and road racer. Veteran of multiple Transcontinental races and elite-level time trials.
tone: First-person narrative, experiential, candid, describing physical struggle, fatigue, road feel, and tactical choices.
structure: Race/training scenarios, personal experience, transition into technical measurement details, real-world application.

formatting.subheadingStyle: Storytelling headings (e.g., 'Where the Rubber Meets the Road')
formatting.equationUsage: Simple power/drag balances or drafting efficiency ratios.
formatting.tableUsage: Comparison table of feelings vs sensor numbers in different environments.
